description: Extract and target a specific sub-expression within rendered math text by pattern matching with an optional occurrence index. Returns a reference to the matched term for subsequent manipulation (textreplace, textmove, textreveal, textcopy, textswap, write). Works on write or label objects.
utility: Extract and target specific portions of rendered math text

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Reference to a write or label variable

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: ASCII math pattern to match within the rendered text

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: 1-based occurrence index (1 = first match, 2 = second, etc.). If omitted, returns all matches as a collection.

alternates.description: Select first occurrence of pattern in M
Select all occurrences as a collection
Select items then animate them with write()

examples.scenario: Select r variable from circle standard form for textreplace (equation of a circle lesson)
Select center coordinate from given values for substitution (equation of a circle lesson)
Select h and k placeholders for textreplace (equation of a circle lesson)
examples.expression:
select_7 = select(write_4, "− h", 1)
select_8 = select(write_4, "− k", 1)

examples.scenario: Select expanded product for textcopy into combined expression (circle from diameter lesson)
Select point coordinates for outline emphasis (Point and Circle lesson)
Select coefficient values from written equation for textcopy into vertex formula
Select multiple x occurrences for textreplace substitution in height equation
examples.expression:
select_6 = select(write_15, "x", 1)
select_7 = select(write_15, "x", 2)
select_8 = select(write_15, "x", 3)

examples.scenario: Select squared terms in Pythagorean equation for textscale emphasis
examples.expression:
select_5 = select(write_11, "2", 1)
select_6 = select(write_11, "2", 2)
select_7 = select(write_11, "2", 3)
text_scale_1 = textscale(select_5, select_6, select_7, size(2))
